name: Scheduling Meeting :Sending Google Meet Link and SMS with the details Of Booked Slot

expect.name: useDefault
expect.label: Use the default reminder settings for this event

expect.name: sendUpdates
expect.label: Send notifications about the event creation

expect.name: useColumnHeaders
expect.label: Use column headers as IDs of the columns

mapper.body:
Hi {{2.`0`}},

✅ Your meeting is confirmed.
📅 Date & Time: {{2.`3`}}
Meeting link has been sent to your email.

Thank you!

Hi {{2.`0`}},

❌ Sorry, the selected time slot is already booked.

Please choose another available time.

Thank you!

Hi {{2.`0`}},  

Thanks for your interest.  

Our team will contact you on {{2.`3`}} ({{2.`4`}}) to discuss your request.

If you're comfortable with this schedule, please reply YES to confirm.

Looking forward to speaking with you.
